## How was it verified?

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Added screenshots for visible changes
- [ ] Updated public documentation where needed

## Portability check

- [ ] Generated apps remain self-contained
- [ ] Generated apps make zero runtime network requests
- [ ] No sensitive fixture data is included
